generated_oml:
instance InternalTemperatureSensorA : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Internal temperature sensor for monitoring chamber conditions"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTempDataA
]

instance InternalTemperatureSensorB : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Second internal temperature sensor for chamber conditions"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTempDataB
]

instance ExternalTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "External temperature sensor measuring ambient conditions"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ExternalTempData
]

instance InternalTempDataA : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTemperatureSensorA
]

instance InternalTempDataB : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTemperatureSensorB
]

instance ExternalTempData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ExternalTemperatureSensor
]

instance InternalTempDataA_RealTime : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data stream from InternalTemperatureSensorA"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTempDataA
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ThermalModelEnabler, CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler
]

instance InternalTempDataB_RealTime : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data stream from InternalTemperatureSensorB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTempDataB
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ThermalModelEnabler, CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler
]

instance ExternalTempSensor_Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time ambient temperature data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ExternalTempData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ThermalModelEnabler, CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler
]

instance TwoParameterThermalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Two-parameter thermal model representing heatbed and environment dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ThermalModelEnabler
]

instance FourParameterThermalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Four-parameter thermal model representing detailed thermal behavior of incubator components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ThermalModelEnabler
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms for adjusting thermal model parameters using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HeatingOptimizationService
]

instance ThermalModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation models for predicting thermal behavior"
    DTDFVocab:enables ThermalPredictionService
]

instance HardwareControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi-based hardware control system for physical actuation and data acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperatureMonitoringService
]

instance TemperatureMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of temperature via sensor data integration"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitorInsight, OptimalityMonitorInsight
]

instance ThermalPredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation-based prediction of thermal behavior for proactive adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight
]

instance HeatingOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of heating parameters through calibration algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight, AdjustHeatbedAction, AdjustFanAction
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identifies anomalies or failures in the incubator system using sensor data and models"
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimates current system state based on sensor measurements and model predictions"
]

instance SafetyMonitorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Monitors system safety parameters to prevent hazardous conditions"
]

instance OptimalityMonitorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assesses system efficiency and optimality for operational adjustments"
]

instance AdjustHeatbedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of heatbed power to maintain temperature"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustFanAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of fan speed for thermal uniformity"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heating element for temperature regulation"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Circulation fan for uniform heat distribution"
]

instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Insulated container providing thermal isolation"
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Microcontroller unit managing sensor data and actuation"
]

instance IncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical incubator system environment"
    base:contains Heatbed, Fan, StyrofoamContainer, RaspberryPiController, InternalTemperatureSensorA, InternalTemperatureSensorB, ExternalTemperatureSensor
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation of simulation models was performed through experimental comparison, where the four-parameter model demonstrated higher fidelity in predicting thermal inertia of the heatbed compared to the two-parameter model; however, specific uncertainty quantification or error correction mechanisms are not detailed in the documents."
]
